contactForm.name: Name

contactForm.messagePlaceholder: Share your project scope, timeline, stakeholders, and target outcomes.
contactForm.fileHint: Optional. Accepted formats: PDF, DOC, DOCX. Maximum 10MB.

contactForm.errorFileType: Upload a PDF, DOC, or DOCX file only.
